target_note: Next-day change in generic US Treasury 10Y yield (close-to-close proxy).

signal_spec.z_causal: Rolling mean/std use dx shifted by 1 (only past days).
signal_spec.position: signal at close t applies to yield change from t to t+1.
signal_spec.pnl_proxy: -signal * (y[t+1]-y[t]); +1 signal = bet on lower yields (duration long).
signal_spec.execution_order: Signal at t uses feature through x[t] (dx_t) and rolling stats of dx using only dx up to t-1. PnL uses y[t+1]-y[t]; y[t+1] is not in z_t. Runtime check: perturbing feature after t does not change z_t/signal_t.
signal_spec.buy_hold_benchmark: Constant LONG DV01 on the same backtest rows: daily -(y[t+1]-y[t]), aligned to each factor's valid sample.
